text: GitOps (Weaveworks, 2017) is an operational framework using Git as the single source of truth for declarative infrastructure and applications. Git commits trigger automated deployment. Tools: Argo CD, Flux CD. GitOps applies DevOps best practices (version control, code review, CI/CD) to infrastructure.
